title: QueryRequest
description: A search query and additional parameters for search.

query.description: Unstructured text query.  Exactly one of 'query' or 'multi_index_query' must be specified.

multi_index_query.description: A search query expressed as a collection of multiple column-level queries.  Exactly one of 'query' or 'multi_index_query' must be specified. A column/index can be queried with multiple queries.

limit.description: Max number of results to return.
